name.description: Specifies the name for the table, must be unique for the schema in which the table is created

kind.description: Table type - permanent, transient, or temporary

cluster_by.description: Specifies one or more columns or column expressions in the table as the clustering key

enable_schema_evolution.description: Table has schema evolution enabled or disabled

change_tracking.description: Change tracking is enabled or disabled

data_retention_time_in_days.description: Specifies the retention period for the table so that Time Travel actions SELECT, CLONE, UNDROP can be performed on historical data in the table

max_data_extension_time_in_days.description: Specifies the retention period for the table so that Time Travel actions SELECT, CLONE, UNDROP can be performed on historical data in the table

default_ddl_collation.description: Specifies a default collation specification for the columns in the table, including columns added to the table in the future

created_on.description: Date and time when the table was created.

database_name.description: Database in which the table is stored

schema_name.description: Schema in which the table is stored

rows.description: Number of rows in the table. Returns NULL for external tables.

bytes.description: Number of bytes that will be scanned if the entire table is scanned in a query. Note that this number may be different than the number of actual physical bytes stored on-disk for the table

dropped_on.description: Date and time when the table was dropped

automatic_clustering.description: If Automatic Clustering is enabled for your account, specifies whether it is explicitly enabled or disabled for the table.

search_optimization.description: If ON, the table has the search optimization service enabled

search_optimization_progress.description: Percentage of the table that has been optimized for search.

search_optimization_bytes.description: Number of additional bytes of storage that the search optimization service consumes for this table

owner_role_type.description: The type of role that owns the object.

budget.description: Name of the budget if the object is monitored by a budget
